description.es: Aunque la odontología es mi profesión, me apasiona explorar la tecnología y la inteligencia artificial como motores de innovación.  Con base en Iquique, Chile, y con un gran amor por el buceo autónomo y la fotografía, disfruto optimizando y automatizando procesos, descubriendo herramientas avanzadas y manteniéndome en constante aprendizaje del mundo digital.
description.en: Although dentistry is my profession, I am passionate about exploring technology and artificial intelligence as drivers of innovation. Based in Iquique, Chile, and with a deep love for scuba diving and photography, I enjoy optimizing and automating processes, discovering advanced tools, and constantly learning in the digital world.

description.es: Rescue Diver con 5 Especialidades, Deep Diver, Nitrox, Peek Performance Bouyancy, Sidemount, Dry Suit.
description.en: Development of responsive and accessible user interfaces.

description.en: Designing interfaces and user experiences for diverse clients.
